Class Polynomial

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.arith.Polynomial
public class Polynomial extends Object
Class for analysing and modifying polynomial expressions over the integers

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Polynomial
    ONE
    The polynomial expression of the BigInteger constant '1'.
    static final Polynomial
    ZERO
    The polynomial expression of the BigInteger constant '0'.

    • add

      public Polynomial add(Polynomial p)

    • coeffGcd

      public BigInteger coeffGcd()
      Returns:
      the greatest common divisor of the coefficients of the monomials of this polynomial. The constant part of the polynomial is not taken into account. If there are no monomials (apart from the constant term), the result is BigInteger.ZERO

    • valueLess

      public boolean valueLess(Polynomial p)
      Returns:
      true if the value of this will always be less than the value of p (i.e., same monomials, but the constant part is less or equal)

    • valueEq

      public boolean valueEq(Polynomial p)
      Returns:
      true if the value of this will always be equal to the value of p (i.e., same monomials and same constant part)

    • valueUneq

      public boolean valueUneq(Polynomial p)

    • valueEq

      public boolean valueEq(BigInteger c)

    • valueUneq

      public boolean valueUneq(BigInteger c)

    • valueLeq

      public boolean valueLeq(Polynomial p)
      Returns:
      true if the value of this will always be less or equal than the value of p (i.e., same monomials, but the constant part is less or equal)

    • valueLess

      public boolean valueLess(BigInteger c)

    • valueGeq

      public boolean valueGeq(BigInteger c)

    • sameParts

      public boolean sameParts(Polynomial p)

    • toTerm

      public Term toTerm(Services services)
      Creates a term from this polynomial expression.
      Parameters:
      services - the services object
      Returns:
      the resulting term
